title: Chapter 5 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)

{{Quote|On the water planet of Mon Calamari, Jedi Kit Fisto leads an attack on Separatist forces. He commands a squadron of amphibious clone troopers for the undersea offensive against a well-armed aquatic squad of the Droid Army.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/5.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Five (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 5'''" is the fifth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the fifth episode in [[Clone Wars: Season One|Season One]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 13]], [[2003]].

==Plot summary==
{{Quote|Master Fisto, in these matters, trust your insight, we do. May the Force be with you.|Yoda to Kit Fisto|<ref name="Episode">{{CW|5}}</ref>}}
A voice-over from [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] explains that the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] has split between its two native [[Species/Legends|species]]: the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who are loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]], who have joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The Quarren have formed a Separatist-aligned government, the [[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League]], and taken over the planet.

The voice-over is revealed to be a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of Yoda communicating to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] on the bridge of his [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]. Yoda orders Fisto to help the Calamari to retake the planet in the name of the Republic.

The ''Acclamator'' [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] carrying [[Kit Fisto's SCUBA Division|Fisto's army]] "lands" on Mon Calamari, floating on top of the world-spanning sea. The aquatic Fisto leaps first into the water, with several divisions of Kit Fisto's [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|SCUBA troopers]] following behind him.

The [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]] begins when the Republic forces come under attack by [[Manta droid subfighter]]s, [[Separatist Sub-Carrier|Sub Carriers]] and [[Mini-sub]]s, as well as Quarren and [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] soldiers. The Republic army is reinforced by the [[Mon Calamari Knights/Legends|Mon Calamari Knights]].

The trouble begins for Kit when the Quarren unveil their [[Crab cannon]], using it to destroy several of his floating ''Acclamators''. With the help of the Knights, as well as a use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], the Cannon is first critically damaged, then pushed off the edge of a steep underwater ravine. The tide of the battle then turns in favor of the Republic.

==Continuity==
The [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]] [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] swaps this chapter with "[[Chapter 4 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 4]]."

The short comic ''[[Fierce Currents]]'' is a follow-up to this episode.
